title: Microcharis kucharii
taxonomy: Microcharis kucharii is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Faboideae and tribe Indigofereae. Microcharis kucharii is native to tropical Africa, specifically in the regions of Tanzania and Mozambique. The plant is further classified as a member of the genus Microcharis within the Fabaceae family. Its classification is based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic analysis.

The plant has been found to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the management of various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and inflammation.
